name: gvault-get-mail-results

outputs.description: Email addresses CCed on the mail GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.BCC Email addresses BCCed on the mail
outputs.name: GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.CC

outputs.description: The date the email was sent GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.From The sender of the email
outputs.name: GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.DateSent

outputs.description: The subject of the email GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.DateReceived The date the email was received
outputs.name: GoogleVault.Matter.Export.Results.Subject
